message:
feat(membrane-tests): add 21 TSM pipeline E2E tests (bd-32e.6)

Comprehensive end-to-end tests for the Transparent Safety Membrane
validation pipeline covering null/foreign pointer handling, alloc-
validate-free lifecycle, double-free detection, concurrent validation,
latency budgets, deterministic mixed workloads, and TLS cache hits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
